# slideshowItem(at:)

**Instance Method**

Returns the item for a given index

## Declaration

```swift
func slideshowItem(at index: Int) -> Any!
```

## Parameters

- **index**: An index of an item in the slideshow.

## Return Value

The object that corresponds to the item at the specified index. The item can be any of the following objects: [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit/NSImage], [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSString] (to specify a path name), [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSURL], [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/FileWrapper], [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGImage], or [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/PDFKit/PDFPage].

## Discussion

Your data source must implement this method.

## Providing Slideshow Information

- **numberOfSlideshowItems()**: Returns the number of items in a slideshow.
- **nameOfSlideshowItem(at:)**: Returns the display name for item at the specified index.
- **canExportSlideshowItem(at:toApplication:)**: Reports whether the export button should be enabled for a slideshow item.
